notes: v1.14.144 - BLUE ICON REBRAND Stage 3 (Deploy > Tools grid + Log-a-Blocker): the 5 Deploy>Tools tiles MANIFEST/PORT MAP/RACK MAP/CRASH-CART/SOPS now render their branded blue WebP art, and the Log-a-Blocker banner renders the blue phantom-action-blocker art at 46px. BOM stays on its inline line-SVG (clean reroll still pending). MECHANISM: deploy_showTools is the redesign-only Work>Deploy>Tools surface (legacy uses showOpsTab, untouched). Added an optional img: field to the 5 tool entries in DEPLOY_TOOLS (BOM has none) and an img-or-svg branch gated on body.rd in deploy_showTools (var _rd) - so BOM and any legacy call fall through to the identical inline SVG. Tool tiles use the existing rf-i-img(76px) + a NEW body.rd .deploy-tools-grid .rf-card .rf-cic{96px} rule (the global 96px cell rule was #ref-grid/#work-grid-scoped; the grid wrapper got a deploy-tools-grid class). Per-tile accent frame (--rfac: bom #28e0ff, manifest #8a4bff, portmap #30d158, rackmap #ffcb45, crashcart #ff8a00, sops #28e0ff) preserved - art carries its own color. The blocker mark is also body.rd-gated (img at 46px vs the original 20px red warning svg). ?legacy=1 byte-identical (deploy_showTools redesign-only + body.rd gate + new CSS body.rd-scoped). Precache-first: the 5 phantom-tool-*-256.webp + phantom-action-blocker-256.webp added to sw.js PRECACHE_URLS. Three-stamp lockstep 143->144. Gates: node --check x3 + sw.js, CSS brace balance (+1 rule), version.json valid JSON, 0 lone-LF. Render-verified iPhone14. DEVICE-VERIFY (gloved): close+reopen, confirm v1.14.144, Work > Deploy > Tools - MANIFEST/PORT MAP/RACK MAP/CRASH-CART/SOPS show the blue art at the same size as Ref/Work tiles in their accent frames, BOM still the line-icon, the Log-a-Blocker banner shows the blue mark; tapping each tool still opens its tab and the blocker still routes to handoff; airplane reload paints; ?legacy=1 = legacy ops-tabs unchanged. PORT MAP is now filled (was the long-open green gap). NEXT (await John, never chain): Stage 4 launcher (lbtn SVG->webp) -> .145 (==parked C4), Stage 5 SYS-pill EKG->webp -> .146 (CONFIRM w/John - live status element), Stage 6 bake 0.85x cyan glow -> .147 (supersedes parked C3). BOM tool tile PENDING reroll. PRIOR v1.14.143 = shield 42px tweak; .142 = blue Stage 2 shield+cyan border; .141 = blue Stage 1 drop-ins.
